content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

{"change_summary":"Completed the pending PR-watch remediation. The watcher now merges only the observed PR head by threading `PrStatusSnapshot.head_sha` into the merge port and invoking `gh pr merge --match-head-commit <head_sha>`, aborting if no observed head SHA is available. PR status no longer derives `latest_push_at` from commit `committedDate`; without an actual push timestamp, bot line-comment filtering falls back to head-SHA matching. The CLI now rejects `--poll-interval 0` with a positive-seconds parser. Added regression coverage for observed-head merge behavior, missing-head abort, head-SHA comment fallback, and zero poll interval rejection.","outstanding_risks":["The working tree still contains pre-existing `.ralph-burning/projects/itn1-1/` orchestration-state modifications outside the requested source review scope; I did not inspect or change them.","Plain ambient `cargo` cannot run because rustup has no default toolchain configured, so Cargo gates were run through `nix dev
